comments.body: Note I think you have to link a Jira card now as this is a frozen RHEL branch @vrothberg.
@TomSweeneyRedHat do I need one given this fixes a test flake?

Since this is only fixing a test, merging.
/approve
/lgtm

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *openshift-cherrypick-robot*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v4.6.1-rhel/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Test only changes are always happily accepted.  But Paul's right, any other kind of change needs a Jira Card or BZ.
